name: Two-Cheese Picante Smoked Turkey Dip
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Smoked turkey, finely chopped (from the deli)
1/2 cup Sliced green onions with tops
recipeInstructions: Combine cream cheese and Pace sauce in a small saucepan. Stir over low heat until the cheese is melted. Add the smoked turkey, green onions, and Parmesan cheese. Heat through, stirring frequently. Transfer to a serving dish and sprinkle with additional green onion slices. Serve warm with vegetable dippers, thin breadsticks, or unsalted chips. Makes 2-1/2 cups.
